verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Years of time, are swiftly passing Bringing nearer heaven’s goal Soon I’ll be at home with Jesus While eternal ages roll.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh how precious is the promise That with gladness fills my soul I shall be at home with Jesus While eternal ages roll

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: After the last farewells are spoken I shall meet my dear ones I’ve known In the presence of my Saviour When we stand before His Throne.
